---
name: User Story
about: Create a new user story for a feature or enhancement
title: "[STORY] "
labels: ["type: feature", "status: backlog"]
---

## User Story

**As a** [User Type/Persona]
**I want** [Feature/Action]
**So that** [Business Value/Benefit]

## Description

[Provide more detailed context about the story]

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] **AC1:** [Specific, measurable criterion]
  - [ ] Technical Task 1.1
  - [ ] Technical Task 1.2

- [ ] **AC2:** [Specific, measurable criterion]
  - [ ] Technical Task 2.1

- [ ] **AC3:** [Specific, measurable criterion]

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code review approved
- [ ] Unit tests written (>80% coverage)
- [ ] Integration tests passed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] OpenAPI spec updated (if API change)
- [ ] Performance impact assessed
- [ ] No breaking changes (or migration guide provided)

## Story Points Estimate

**Complexity:** Easy / Medium / Hard
**Effort:** 1-2 Days / 3-5 Days / >1 Week
**Total Estimate:** ___ SP

## Dependencies

- Depends on: #___
- Blocks: #___
- Related: #___, #___

## Technical Considerations

[Any architectural decisions, API changes, database migrations, etc.]

## Design/Wireframes

[Link to Figma, screenshots, or wireframes if applicable]

## Team Assignment

- **Primary:** @username
- **Secondary:** @username

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (Blocks other work)
- [ ] High (Important feature)
- [ ] Medium (Regular feature)
- [ ] Low (Nice to have)
